dimensions.name: Impact & Achievements
dimensions.criteria: Uses quantified data to describe achievements (not just responsibilities). Follows STAR method. Demonstrates measurable outcomes.

dimensions.name: Relevance & Targeting
dimensions.criteria: Content aligns with the target role. Highlights relevant experience and skills. Tailored rather than generic.

dimensions.name: Structure & Formatting
dimensions.criteria: Clear information hierarchy. Logical sections. Consistent formatting. Appropriate length (1-2 pages).

dimensions.name: Language & Clarity
dimensions.criteria: Strong action verbs. No grammar errors. Concise and impactful writing. Professional tone.

dimensions.name: Skills Presentation
dimensions.criteria: Skills are clearly listed and demonstrated through experience. Consistency with verified skill profile. Technical and soft skills balanced.

dimensions.name: ATS Compatibility
dimensions.criteria: Keyword coverage for target role. Parseable format (no complex tables/graphics). Standard section headings.
